text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, were you napping during class? When<n>I looked
over, you were<n>uncharacteristically still...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! Y-you must be imagining things!<n>Sleeping
in class is forbidden!<n>Prohibited! Absolutely not
allowed!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What a lovely sentiment... But I saw you<n>nodding
off, so please stop lying.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Awww... I guess I can't fool you, Grass...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've been trying to wake up early to get<n>in a bit
more running, but... now I'm so<n>sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I suppose I could show you myclass notes just this once.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass... Gracias! You have my gratitude!<n>
Appreciation! My deepest thanks!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Wait, if you're going to show me<n>your notes,
then I can take a short siesta<n>during—
